description_long: This house features a simple, rectangular structure with a steeply pitched gable roof in a light gray color. The front facade includes a central wooden door flanked by two symmetrically placed windows, each with dark brown frames and visible window panes. The side views reveal the depth of the roof overhang and a single window on one side, while the rear view shows a single centered window. The exterior walls are smooth and painted a light gray, contrasting with the darker trim and window frames. The roof extends well beyond the walls, providing significant shelter at the eaves. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban or rural residential architecture.
description: A modest, single-story house with a steep gable roof, central wooden door, and symmetrically arranged windows in dark frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door centered between two windows with dark frames.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the steep gable roof and a single window centered on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window centered on the back wall, no door visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, matching the front's window style and roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with no porch or steps, flanked by two windows and sheltered by a deep roof overhang.
